summary.en: A personalized benefits and engagement platform for global, hybrid teams.
summary.zh: 為全球混合辦公團隊打造的個人化福利與員工參與平台。

highlight.en: Happl lets employees pick the benefits right for them while giving managers engagement tools, handling all the compliance and admin behind the scenes for UK employers.
highlight.zh: Happl 讓員工自選最適合的福利，並為主管提供員工參與工具，同時在背後處理所有合規與行政事務，服務英國雇主。

summary.en: A mobile-first 'Office' suite for businesses in India.
summary.zh: 為印度行動優先企業打造的「Office」辦公套件。

highlight.en: Kaagaz lets small businesses handle all their document needs from a smartphone without a desktop, serving over 3M active users and 60,000+ paying subscribers.
highlight.zh: Kaagaz 讓小型企業無需桌機，僅用手機即可處理所有文件需求，目前擁有超過 300 萬活躍用戶與 6 萬以上付費訂閱者。

summary.en: An all-in-one finance platform for borderless businesses in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲無國界企業打造的一站式財務平台。

highlight.en: Nash's ledger-based operating system connects money accounts, accounting systems, payment providers, treasury, and spend management in one place for borderless African commerce.
highlight.zh: Nash 以帳本為基礎的作業系統，將資金帳戶、會計系統、支付服務商、資金調度與支出管理整合於一處，推動非洲無國界商務。

summary.en: Low-code, AI-driven push notification marketing for mobile apps.
summary.zh: 為行動應用打造的低程式碼、AI 驅動推播通知行銷工具。

highlight.en: nGrow connects to analytics tools like Amplitude, Firebase, and Mixpanel to set up automated push campaigns in hours, with customers reporting up to 30% incremental revenue lift.
highlight.zh: nGrow 串接 Amplitude、Firebase、Mixpanel 等分析工具，數小時內即可設定自動化推播活動，客戶回報營收增量最高達 30%。

summary.en: Building systems to remove carbon dioxide from air at industrial scale.
summary.zh: 打造工業規模從空氣中移除二氧化碳的系統。

highlight.en: AirMyne, based in Berkeley, builds machines that capture CO2 directly from ambient air so it can be utilized or sequestered downstream.
highlight.zh: 總部位於柏克萊的 AirMyne 打造直接從周遭空氣捕捉二氧化碳的機器，供後續利用或封存。

summary.en: An asteroid mining company that refines and returns only what's valuable.
summary.zh: 一家只精煉並帶回有價值物質的小行星採礦公司。

highlight.en: Rather than hauling back whole asteroids, AstroForge breaks them up, refines them in space, and returns only the valuable material.
highlight.zh: AstroForge 不將整顆小行星帶回，而是將其分解、於太空中精煉，僅帶回有價值的物質。

summary.en: Global payments infrastructure for companies operating in LATAM and the US.
summary.zh: 為在拉美與美國營運的企業打造的全球支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Rebill lets global companies accept payments, subscriptions, and installments across LATAM and the US through one integration, with no local entities and 100+ payment methods.
highlight.zh: Rebill 讓全球企業透過單一整合，在拉美與美國接受付款、訂閱與分期，無需設立當地實體，並支援超過 100 種付款方式。

summary.en: Potent, durable, and redosable non-viral genetic medicines.
summary.zh: 強效、持久且可重複給藥的非病毒型基因藥物。

highlight.en: Engage Bio developed Tethosomes, a new class of non-viral DNA for scalable genetic medicine, and was acquired by Eli Lilly in 2026.
highlight.zh: Engage Bio 開發了 Tethosomes，一種可規模化的非病毒型 DNA 基因藥物新類別，並於 2026 年被禮來收購。

summary.en: A mobile app for payday advances and bill installments.
summary.zh: 提供薪資預支與帳單分期的行動應用程式。

highlight.en: Wagetap lets users get an advance of up to $2,000 on their next payday and split bills into manageable installments, aiming to become an everyday financial partner.
highlight.zh: Wagetap 讓用戶在下次發薪日前預支最高 2,000 美元，並將帳單分為可負擔的分期，目標成為大眾的日常財務夥伴。

summary.en: A reconciliation and financial operations platform for companies.
summary.zh: 為企業打造的對帳與財務作業平台。

highlight.en: Proper connects banks, API providers, and networks in one platform with automated reconciliation and accounting, so companies maintain financial accuracy at scale.
highlight.zh: Proper 將銀行、API 供應商與支付網路整合於單一平台，並提供自動對帳與會計功能，讓企業在規模化時維持財務正確性。

summary.en: AI-driven HVAC control systems for improved energy performance.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的暖通空調控制系統，提升能源表現。

highlight.en: Axross builds AI-driven HVAC controls tailored for manufacturers that need precise environmental conditions, cutting energy use and operational costs.
highlight.zh: Axross 為需要精準環境控制的製造商打造 AI 驅動的暖通空調系統，降低能源消耗與營運成本。

summary.en: AI-powered marketing automation for modern companies.
summary.zh: 為現代企業打造的 AI 驅動行銷自動化工具。

highlight.en: Blaze uses AI to scan millions of online signals, helping companies target the right potential customers the moment they show interest.
highlight.zh: Blaze 運用 AI 掃描數百萬個線上訊號，協助企業在潛在客戶展現興趣的當下即精準鎖定。

summary.en: An online marketplace for team retreat venues.
summary.zh: 團隊出遊場地的線上媒合市集。

highlight.en: TeamOut offers 20+ bedroom private venues with robust WiFi that managers can book in a few clicks, compressing months of retreat planning into days.
highlight.zh: TeamOut 提供具備穩定 WiFi、20 間以上臥房的私人場地，主管只需點幾下即可預訂，將數月的出遊規劃縮短為數天。

summary.en: A modern, accessible private bank for the next generation of affluent professionals.
summary.zh: 為新世代富裕專業人士打造的現代化、更易取得的私人銀行。

highlight.en: Onyx offers digital-native premium banking and wealth management aimed at overlooked young high-earners, entrepreneurs, and tech employees, aspiring to be the next-generation UBS.
highlight.zh: Onyx 提供數位原生的高端銀行與財富管理服務，鎖定常被忽略的年輕高收入族群、創業者與科技從業者，立志成為新世代的 UBS。

summary.en: An AI-powered app for practicing spoken English.
summary.zh: 以 AI 驅動的英語口說練習應用程式。

highlight.en: MySivi combines an AI English tutor with human practice so learners can improve their spoken English quickly, aiming for noticeable change within a week.
highlight.zh: MySivi 結合 AI 英語家教與真人練習，讓學習者快速提升英語口說，主打一週內即可感受到改變。

summary.en: Making carbon-negative chemicals from CO2 using fermentation.
summary.zh: 利用發酵技術從二氧化碳製造碳負排放化學品。

highlight.en: Phase Biolabs uses fermentation to turn CO2 into carbon-negative solvents and electro-fuels, supported by Bill Gates' Breakthrough Energy Innovator Fellowship.
highlight.zh: Phase Biolabs 透過發酵將二氧化碳轉化為碳負排放的溶劑與電燃料，並獲比爾蓋茲突破能源創新者獎助計畫支持。

summary.en: An AI-native project management tool you can chat with.
summary.zh: 可對話操作的 AI 原生專案管理工具。

highlight.en: Dart lets teams chat with AI to create tasks, plan roadmaps, and generate reports, with customizable agents that handle routine PM chores and free up about seven hours per week.
highlight.zh: Dart 讓團隊透過與 AI 對話來建立任務、規劃路線圖與產生報告，並以可自訂代理人處理例行專案管理雜務，每週省下約七小時。

summary.en: Fashion shopping with on-demand delivery and returns.
summary.zh: 提供隨選配送與退貨的時尚購物服務。

highlight.en: Ole lets customers order clothes from nearby stores, try them on at home while the driver waits, and keep only what they like, with a $200 average order value 7x the on-demand norm.
highlight.zh: Ole 讓顧客向附近商店訂購衣物，在司機等候時於家中試穿、只留下喜歡的，平均客單價 200 美元，是一般隨選業務的 7 倍。

summary.en: An on-device natural language understanding API for speech.
summary.zh: 可在裝置端運行的語音自然語言理解 API。

highlight.en: Speechly processes high-accuracy spoken language understanding directly on the user's device, affordably turning vast daily audio into actionable insights.
highlight.zh: Speechly 直接在用戶裝置上進行高準確度的口語理解，以低成本將每日海量音訊轉化為可行動的洞察。

summary.en: Rapidly deployable energy solutions for commercial and industrial customers.
summary.zh: 為商業與工業客戶打造的快速部署能源解決方案。

highlight.en: Posh builds rapidly deployable energy storage and power generation for commercial and industrial customers, with a focus on the AI data center space.
highlight.zh: Posh 為商業與工業客戶打造可快速部署的儲能與發電解決方案，並聚焦於 AI 資料中心領域。

summary.en: A social streaming platform powered by creators and fans.
summary.zh: 由創作者與粉絲驅動的社交串流平台。

highlight.en: Argo helps brands and creators monetize their video entertainment more efficiently while building engaged communities and rewarding their fans.
highlight.zh: Argo 協助品牌與創作者更有效率地將影音娛樂變現，同時建立活躍社群並回饋粉絲。

summary.en: An AI platform that brings still photos to life with animation.
summary.zh: 以 AI 讓靜態照片動起來的動畫平台。

highlight.en: Vimmerse gives designers, branding agencies, and online stores an AI platform, apps, and API to animate their images at scale and stand out from the crowd.
highlight.zh: Vimmerse 為設計師、品牌代理商與線上商店提供 AI 平台、應用程式與 API，可大規模為圖像製作動畫，讓品牌脫穎而出。

summary.en: A pediatric digital therapeutic for behavior disorders in US families.
summary.zh: 為美國家庭打造、針對兒童行為障礙的數位治療平台。

highlight.en: Joon's game-based digital therapeutic has kids level up by doing real-life behaviors managed by parents and clinicians, starting with ADHD, autism, anxiety, and depression.
highlight.zh: Joon 以遊戲化數位治療讓孩童透過完成由家長與臨床醫師管理的現實行為來升級，初期聚焦於過動症、自閉症、焦慮與憂鬱。

summary.en: An AI agent for community association management.
summary.zh: 用於社區協會管理的 AI 代理人。

highlight.en: HOAi's AI workforce platform automates labor-heavy community association management processes, and was acquired by Vantaca in Fall 2024.
highlight.zh: HOAi 的 AI 勞動力平台自動化社區協會管理中的繁重作業流程，並於 2024 年秋季被 Vantaca 收購。

summary.en: Education benefits and leave of absence management for employers.
summary.zh: 為雇主提供教育福利與請假管理服務。

highlight.en: Unsaddl lets employers offer education benefits like student loan and 529 plan contributions and tuition reimbursement, alongside leave of absence management.
highlight.zh: Unsaddl 讓雇主提供學貸與 529 計畫提撥、學費補助等教育福利，並一併處理請假管理。

summary.en: An intelligent, visual knowledge base for learning complex topics.
summary.zh: 用於學習複雜主題的智慧型視覺知識庫。

highlight.en: Built for students, researchers, and lifelong learners, Heptabase pairs a visual knowledge base with AI to help users master what they learn and do their best research.
highlight.zh: Heptabase 專為學生、研究者與終身學習者打造，結合視覺化知識庫與 AI，協助使用者精通所學並做出最佳研究。

summary.en: Next-generation, modular electric vehicles with art-deco design.
summary.zh: 採用裝飾藝術風格的新世代模組化電動車。

highlight.en: Olympian builds art-deco EVs on an open, modular architecture that it says cuts tooling and machinery costs by 85-90% and shortens production lead times by 60-80% versus US legacy automakers.
highlight.zh: Olympian 以開放式模組化架構打造裝飾藝術風格電動車，宣稱相較美國傳統車廠可降低 85-90% 的模具與機具成本，並縮短 60-80% 的生產前置時間。

summary.en: Seamless fiat-to-crypto payment infrastructure for Web3.
summary.zh: 為 Web3 打造的無縫法幣轉加密貨幣支付基礎設施。

highlight.en: Poko's SDK lets Web3 wallets, marketplaces, games, and DApps add fiat-to-crypto onramping with 100+ local payment methods, cutting onramp costs by up to 70% via smart routing.
highlight.zh: Poko 的 SDK 讓 Web3 錢包、市集、遊戲與 DApp 加入支援 100 多種在地付款方式的法幣轉加密入金功能，並透過智慧路由將入金成本最高降低 70%。

summary.en: A supply chain platform that simplifies fresh-goods procurement in Latin America.
summary.zh: 簡化拉丁美洲生鮮採購的供應鏈平台。

highlight.en: Alima helps restaurants, CPG brands, and retailers in Latin America plan buying orders, order products, manage expenses, and handle logistics for fresh goods.
highlight.zh: Alima 協助拉丁美洲的餐廳、消費品品牌與零售商規劃採購單、下單、管理支出並處理生鮮物流。

summary.en: At-home diagnostics infrastructure offered as a service.
summary.zh: 以服務形式提供的居家檢測基礎設施。

highlight.en: Spot's fully white-labeled platform lets brands offer lab-analyzed diagnostic tests using at-home kits, handling collection, logistics, physician authorization, and lab integrations via API.
highlight.zh: Spot 的全白標平台讓品牌透過居家採檢套組提供經實驗室分析的診斷檢測，並以 API 處理採檢、物流、醫師授權與實驗室整合。

summary.en: A simple, beautiful email sending platform for SaaS companies.
summary.zh: 為 SaaS 公司打造的簡潔精美電子郵件發送平台。

highlight.en: Loops offers a Notion-style block editor, strong transactional deliverability, and pre-built loops that SaaS companies can snap in to boost revenue and engagement.
highlight.zh: Loops 提供 Notion 風格的區塊編輯器、優異的交易型郵件送達率，以及 SaaS 公司可直接套用的預建流程，以提升營收與用戶參與度。

summary.en: Smartwatch-powered coaching to improve team performance and retention.
summary.zh: 以智慧手錶數據驅動的教練服務，提升團隊表現與留任率。

highlight.en: PeakPath pairs each employee with an online coach and uses smartwatch data to improve their physical and mental health, helping enterprises retain staff and boost performance.
highlight.zh: PeakPath 為每位員工配對線上教練，並運用智慧手錶數據改善其身心健康，協助企業留住人才並提升績效。

summary.en: Bringing Tesla-style autonomous manufacturing to every automaker.
summary.zh: 將特斯拉式自主製造帶給每一家車廠。

highlight.en: Built by Tesla's core autonomous factory team, Industrial Next makes the smart cameras and robotic guidance tools that gave Tesla its manufacturing edge, now for other producers.
highlight.zh: 由特斯拉自主工廠核心團隊打造，Industrial Next 製造曾為特斯拉帶來製造優勢的智慧相機與機器人導引工具，如今供其他製造商使用。

summary.en: An Indonesian app for managing finances and growing your money.
summary.zh: 協助管理財務並讓資金增值的印尼應用程式。

highlight.en: Whiz offers Indonesians financial management tools where their money earns more, with deposits insured by the Indonesia Deposit Insurance Corporation.
highlight.zh: Whiz 為印尼用戶提供讓資金獲得更高報酬的財務管理工具，存款並由印尼存款保險公司承保。

summary.en: A single integration for secure, automated EV charging across networks.
summary.zh: 跨網路安全自動化電動車充電的單一整合介面。

highlight.en: Emobi's JustPlug technology works instantly with no special hardware or setup, integrating 122,000+ EV chargers across the US and Canada into North America's largest charging ecosystem.
highlight.zh: Emobi 的 JustPlug 技術無需特殊硬體或設定即可立即使用，整合美加超過 12.2 萬個充電樁，構成北美最大的充電生態系。

summary.en: Corporate expense cards and spend management for businesses in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲企業提供的公司支出卡與支出管理服務。

highlight.en: Boya lets African businesses instantly issue corporate expense cards with real-time spend tracking, building the first card to support mobile money, banks, and card schemes.
highlight.zh: Boya 讓非洲企業即時發行公司支出卡並即時追蹤花費，並打造首張同時支援行動貨幣、銀行與卡組織的公司卡。

summary.en: An AI-based, customizable subscription and revenue management platform.
summary.zh: 以 AI 為基礎、可自訂的訂閱與營收管理平台。

highlight.en: SubscriptionFlow monitors user activity to flag customers at risk of churning and automatically alerts the sales team, helping SMBs optimize subscription revenue.
highlight.zh: SubscriptionFlow 監測用戶活動以標記可能流失的客戶並自動通知銷售團隊，協助中小企業優化訂閱營收。

summary.en: Visually design and manage cloud infrastructure end to end.
summary.zh: 從頭到尾以視覺化方式設計與管理雲端基礎設施。

highlight.en: Brainboard lets engineers visually design and manage cloud infrastructure, lowering the learning curve for Infrastructure as Code with a self-serve model and service catalog.
highlight.zh: Brainboard 讓工程師以視覺化方式設計與管理雲端基礎設施，透過自助模式與服務目錄降低導入基礎設施即程式碼的學習門檻。

summary.en: Booking and management software for tattoo artists and studios.
summary.zh: 為刺青師與工作室打造的預約與管理軟體。

highlight.en: Venue.ink lets tattoo artists receive bookings, manage their calendar, chat with clients, and get paid, so they spend more time on art and less on admin.
highlight.zh: Venue.ink 讓刺青師接收預約、管理行事曆、與客戶聊天並收款，把更多時間留給創作、減少行政負擔。

summary.en: Immersive fantasy worlds experienced through a social media interface.
summary.zh: 透過社群媒體介面體驗的沉浸式幻想世界。

highlight.en: Status lets over 3 million users worldwide live in immersive fantasy worlds through the familiar lens of social media — described as 'Sims but Social Media.'
highlight.zh: Status 讓全球超過 300 萬用戶透過熟悉的社群媒體介面，活在沉浸式的幻想世界裡，被形容為「模擬市民版的社群媒體」。

summary.en: Agentless data discovery, DLP, and DSPM for SaaS, cloud, GenAI, and endpoints.
summary.zh: 為 SaaS、雲端、生成式 AI 與端點打造的無代理資料探索、DLP 與 DSPM。

highlight.en: Strac automatically discovers, classifies, and remediates sensitive data across 40+ integrations including O365, Slack, Salesforce, and ChatGPT, protecting enterprises like UiPath and Databricks.
highlight.zh: Strac 自動探索、分類並修復敏感資料，涵蓋 O365、Slack、Salesforce、ChatGPT 等 40 多項整合，保護 UiPath、Databricks 等企業。

summary.en: A futures and prediction market for events.
summary.zh: 針對事件的期貨與預測市場。

highlight.en: Railbird is building a prediction market exchange to help the services sector hedge risk in volatile markets like hospitality, tourism, recreation, and sports, open to all traders.
highlight.zh: Railbird 正打造一個預測市場交易所，協助服務業在飯店、旅遊、休閒與運動等波動市場中對沖風險，並開放給所有交易者。

summary.en: A collaborative, cloud-based video editor — 'Figma for video.'
summary.zh: 雲端協作影片編輯器，號稱「影片版的 Figma」。

highlight.en: Ozone bills itself as the world's first collaborative video editor in the cloud, building the next generation of creative tools.
highlight.zh: Ozone 自詡為全球首款雲端協作影片編輯器，致力打造新一代的創作工具。

summary.en: A web app with investment education and analysis tools for retail investors.
summary.zh: 為散戶投資人提供投資教育與分析工具的網頁應用。

highlight.en: Built by retail investors for retail investors, Stock Unlock helps beginners start investing and saves time for experienced investors as a place to learn, grow, and invest.
highlight.zh: Stock Unlock 由散戶為散戶打造，協助新手開始投資，並為老手節省時間，成為學習、成長與投資的平台。

summary.en: Customer engagement software built on top of BigQuery and Snowflake.
summary.zh: 建構於 BigQuery 與 Snowflake 之上的客戶互動軟體。

highlight.en: Castled.io offers Braze-like customer engagement but without storing your data — it sits on top of your cloud data warehouse to create segments and engage them across channels.
highlight.zh: Castled.io 提供類似 Braze 的客戶互動功能，但不儲存你的資料，而是直接架在雲端資料倉儲之上建立分眾並跨渠道觸及。

summary.en: An outreach automation platform for email, LinkedIn, and Twitter.
summary.zh: 橫跨 Email、LinkedIn 與 Twitter 的外展自動化平台。

highlight.en: Super Send scales multichannel prospecting with dynamic personalization, email warming, inbox rotation, A/B testing, and analytics while keeping a human touch.
highlight.zh: Super Send 以動態個人化、信箱預熱、收件匣輪替、A/B 測試與分析功能規模化多渠道開發，同時保有人味。

summary.en: The fastest way to build an AI agent connected to your data warehouse.
summary.zh: 串接資料倉儲、快速打造 AI 代理人的工具。

highlight.en: Cotera connects directly to data warehouses and APIs with a visual workflow editor, letting teams deploy agents for ticket routing, voice-of-customer analysis, and customer health monitoring.
highlight.zh: Cotera 直接串接資料倉儲與 API，並提供視覺化工作流程編輯器，讓團隊部署用於工單分流、客戶心聲分析與客戶健康度監測的代理人。

summary.en: Flexible workplace savings and pension plans for SMEs in MENA.
summary.zh: 為中東北非中小企業打造的彈性職場儲蓄與退休金計畫。

highlight.en: FinFlx lets SMEs in MENA launch labour-law-compliant defined contribution pension plans within hours, with digital employee records, plan administration, and investment selection.
highlight.zh: FinFlx 讓中東北非的中小企業在數小時內推出符合當地勞動法的確定提撥退休金計畫，並提供數位化員工紀錄、計畫管理與投資選項。

summary.en: 10x-1000x faster compute for neural network training.
summary.zh: 讓神經網路訓練速度提升 10 至 1000 倍的運算服務。

highlight.en: Strong Compute's software and hardware optimizations speed up neural network development 10x-1000x, file transfer 1000x, and instance start time 10x, pricing cloud by performance not consumption.
highlight.zh: Strong Compute 透過軟硬體優化，使神經網路開發加速 10 至 1000 倍、檔案傳輸加速 1000 倍、執行個體啟動加速 10 倍，並以效能而非用量計價。

summary.en: A webhooks gateway for outgoing and incoming webhooks.
summary.zh: 處理對外與對內 Webhook 的閘道服務。

highlight.en: Convoy is an API gateway for webhooks, letting engineering teams reliably send, receive, and manage millions with retries, rate limiting, static IPs, circuit breaking, and rolling secrets.
highlight.zh: Convoy 是 Webhook 版的 API 閘道，讓工程團隊以重試、限流、靜態 IP、斷路與輪替密鑰機制，可靠地收發與管理數百萬筆 Webhook。

summary.en: An AI-native platform reimagining private wealth for a new generation.
summary.zh: 為新世代重新打造私人財富管理的 AI 原生平台。

highlight.en: GoodFin combines a design-forward experience with intelligent agents to bring AI-driven personalization to alternative-asset investing, targeting the largest intergenerational wealth transfer to date.
highlight.zh: GoodFin 結合設計導向的體驗與智慧代理人，為另類資產投資帶來 AI 驅動的個人化，瞄準史上最大規模的跨世代財富移轉。

summary.en: Delivering toll-free, data-free internet apps for emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場提供免流量、零資費的網路應用。

highlight.en: Through its Zerodata app, Simplifyd lets businesses list websites and apps that end users access data-free, on a mission to reach ~2B people who can't afford internet data.
highlight.zh: Simplifyd 透過其 Zerodata 應用，讓企業上架網站與 App 供終端用戶免流量存取，致力觸及約 20 億負擔不起網路流量的人們。

summary.en: Stablecoin-powered payment infrastructure to unlock African payments.
summary.zh: 以穩定幣驅動的支付基礎設施，打通非洲支付。

highlight.en: Partna provides stablecoin-powered infrastructure to collect, convert, and settle payments between Africa and global markets.
highlight.zh: Partna 提供以穩定幣驅動的基礎設施，用於在非洲與全球市場之間收款、兌換與結算。

summary.en: An AI-native scheduling and workforce management platform for healthcare.
summary.zh: 為醫療照護打造的 AI 原生排班與人力管理平台。

highlight.en: Bemlo generates optimal schedules that balance care demands with employee preferences, freeing up time for patient care across healthcare and social care organizations.
highlight.zh: Bemlo 產生兼顧照護需求與員工偏好的最佳排班，為醫療與社會照護機構騰出更多時間用於照顧病患。

summary.en: Accelerating verifiable computing with zero-knowledge cryptography.
summary.zh: 以零知識密碼學加速可驗證運算。

highlight.en: Argument combines zero-knowledge cryptography, formal verification, and distributed consensus to build unbreakable, scalable, private, decentralized software systems.
highlight.zh: Argument 結合零知識密碼學、形式化驗證與分散式共識，打造牢不可破、可擴展、私密且去中心化的軟體系統。

summary.en: Free digital mental health technologies, making care accessible to everyone.
summary.zh: 提供免費數位心理健康技術，讓人人都能取得照護。

highlight.en: Koko partners with online communities to find and treat at-risk individuals — particularly young people — directly on the platforms where they're struggling.
highlight.zh: Koko 與線上社群合作，直接在用戶掙扎的平台上找出並協助高風險者，特別是年輕族群。

summary.en: An app to earn free bitcoin as cashback when shopping in India.
summary.zh: 在印度購物時賺取免費比特幣回饋的應用程式。

highlight.en: GoSats is a bitcoin rewards app that helps people in India accumulate free bitcoin as cashback and rewards every time they shop.
highlight.zh: GoSats 是一款比特幣回饋應用，讓印度用戶每次購物都能以回饋與獎勵累積免費比特幣。

summary.en: AI that crafts sales emails designed to convert.
summary.zh: 撰寫能促成轉換的 AI 銷售郵件工具。

highlight.en: Flike trains AI on your product marketing knowledge so sales teams can generate hyper-personalized, on-brand emails across the funnel, from cold outbound to upselling.
highlight.zh: Flike 以你的產品行銷知識訓練 AI，讓銷售團隊在整個漏斗中（從陌生開發到追加銷售）產出高度個人化且符合品牌調性的郵件。

summary.en: An NFT exchange designed for professional traders.
summary.zh: 為專業交易者設計的 NFT 交易所。

highlight.en: NFTScoring aimed to bring all NFT liquidity into a single exchange, designed with pro traders in mind.
highlight.zh: NFTScoring 致力將所有 NFT 流動性匯聚於單一交易所，並以專業交易者為設計核心。

summary.en: US-based USD bank accounts for non-US residents in emerging markets.
summary.zh: 為新興市場非美國居民提供的美國美元銀行帳戶。

highlight.en: Elevate offers FDIC-insured USD accounts with ACH, wire payments, and a free Mastercard debit card, plus low-cost regional payouts for non-US residents who struggle to get paid in USD.
highlight.zh: Elevate 提供受 FDIC 保障的美元帳戶，支援 ACH、電匯與免費 Mastercard 簽帳卡，並為難以取得美元收入的非美國居民提供低成本在地匯款。

summary.en: Fully autonomous drones for defense at the global edge.
summary.zh: 用於全球邊緣國防任務的全自主無人機。

highlight.en: Rownd AI builds fully autonomous drones using local edge intelligence and LTE/5G/SatCom failover to eliminate the 1:1 pilot bottleneck, field-deployed with US SOCOM via its ArcEdge AI line.
highlight.zh: Rownd AI 打造運用本地邊緣智慧與 LTE/5G/衛星備援的全自主無人機，消除一機一飛手的瓶頸，並透過其 ArcEdge AI 業務線部署於美國特種作戰司令部。

summary.en: A marketplace of off-market luxury services for the ultra-wealthy.
summary.zh: 為超富裕人士打造的非公開奢華服務市集。

highlight.en: Myria is a private community and concierge for off-market goods and services 'you can't Google,' connecting off-market sellers with the world's nicest and wealthiest buyers.
highlight.zh: Myria 是專營「Google 不到」的非公開商品與服務的私人社群與禮賓平台，串接非公開賣家與全球最頂級富裕的買家。

summary.en: Restaurant loyalty driven by social-media quiz campaigns.
summary.zh: 以社群媒體問答活動驅動的餐廳忠誠度服務。

highlight.en: Bobidi runs Upswell, turning restaurants' promotional social videos into quiz campaigns where winners get cash rewards redeemable in-store, bringing new guests and turning them into regulars.
highlight.zh: Bobidi 經營 Upswell，將餐廳的社群宣傳影片轉為問答活動，得獎者可獲得可於店內兌換的現金獎勵，吸引新客並培養為常客。

summary.en: Automating all IT operations as mission control for enterprise IT teams.
summary.zh: 自動化所有 IT 作業，成為企業 IT 團隊的指揮中心。

highlight.en: Stackshine discovers all software used across an organization and automates onboarding, offboarding, cost savings, and security workflows for enterprise IT teams.
highlight.zh: Stackshine 探索組織內使用的所有軟體，並為企業 IT 團隊自動化入職、離職、成本節省與資安相關流程。

summary.en: AI-powered sales tax, VAT, and GST compliance across borders.
summary.zh: AI 驅動的跨境營業稅、增值稅與消費稅合規平台。

highlight.en: Sphere built local rails into 100+ tax authorities and the world's first AI-native tax engine, automating compliance for companies like Lovable, ElevenLabs, and Replit.
highlight.zh: Sphere 已串接 100 多個稅務機關的在地通道，並打造全球首個 AI 原生稅務引擎，為 Lovable、ElevenLabs、Replit 等公司自動化合規。

summary.en: A platform to collect and analyze in-product user feedback.
summary.zh: 在產品內收集並分析使用者回饋的平台。

highlight.en: With a simple SDK, Blitzllama lets product teams ask users questions within product journeys and get contextual answers in minutes to improve retention and reduce churn.
highlight.zh: Blitzllama 只需簡單的 SDK 整合，即可讓產品團隊在使用者旅程中提問並於數分鐘內取得情境化答案，以提升留存並降低流失。

summary.en: Shopify for WhatsApp commerce.
summary.zh: WhatsApp 商務版的 Shopify。

highlight.en: Take App simplifies WhatsApp ordering to make commerce more intuitive, founded by ex-Facebook engineering manager Youmin Kim who launched Marketplace and Messaging Commerce in SE Asia.
highlight.zh: Take App 簡化 WhatsApp 下單流程讓商務更直覺，創辦人 Youmin Kim 曾任 Facebook 工程經理，於東南亞推出 Marketplace 與訊息商務。

summary.en: Automating corporations, starting with software and code understanding.
summary.zh: 從軟體與程式碼理解著手，自動化企業營運。

highlight.en: Mutable.ai's Auto Wiki turns code into Wikipedia-style articles with citations back to the source, making it easier to understand complex technologies like Kubernetes.
highlight.zh: Mutable.ai 的 Auto Wiki 將程式碼轉為帶有原始碼引用的維基百科式條目，讓人更容易理解 Kubernetes 等複雜技術。

summary.en: A cloud platform to deploy and scale AI applications — 'Heroku for AI.'
summary.zh: 部署與擴展 AI 應用的雲端平台，號稱「AI 版的 Heroku」。

highlight.en: Ploomber is building a cloud platform to help companies deploy and scale their AI applications.
highlight.zh: Ploomber 正打造一個雲端平台，協助企業部署並擴展其 AI 應用程式。

summary.en: Automated WireGuard networks for distributed systems and Kubernetes.
summary.zh: 為分散式系統與 Kubernetes 打造的自動化 WireGuard 網路。

highlight.en: Netmaker is an open-source WireGuard-based virtual networking platform that bridges clouds, edge, IoT, and Kubernetes clusters at speeds it says average 10x faster than alternatives.
highlight.zh: Netmaker 是基於 WireGuard 的開源虛擬網路平台，可橋接雲端、邊緣、物聯網與 Kubernetes 叢集，速度宣稱平均比其他方案快 10 倍。

summary.en: An AI assistant for managing creator-brand partnerships.
summary.zh: 用於管理創作者與品牌合作的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Lizza's AI assistant finds, contacts, and manages the entire collaboration with content creators for D2C e-commerce brands, while helping creators earn a living from their talent.
highlight.zh: Lizza 的 AI 助理為 D2C 電商品牌尋找、聯繫並全程管理與內容創作者的合作，同時協助創作者靠才華維生。

summary.en: A platform to build AI influencers that create content and engage fans autonomously.
summary.zh: 打造能自主創作內容並與粉絲互動的 AI 網紅平台。

highlight.en: Mindbase launches AI avatars on Instagram and YouTube — each with its own email, phone, and WhatsApp — generating 5M+ daily views, with brands paying $1,000-$4,000 per influencer monthly.
highlight.zh: Mindbase 在 Instagram 與 YouTube 推出 AI 虛擬人物，每位都有專屬電子郵件、電話與 WhatsApp，每日產生超過 500 萬次觀看，品牌每月為每位網紅支付 1,000 至 4,000 美元。

summary.en: Tele-dermatology for chronic skin conditions like psoriasis and eczema.
summary.zh: 針對乾癬、濕疹等慢性皮膚病的遠距皮膚科服務。

highlight.en: Northwind connects patients to specialists in under 12 hours via a digital questionnaire and skin photos, providing tailored treatment plans with its own line of vegan OTC and Rx products.
highlight.zh: Northwind 透過數位問卷與皮膚照片，在 12 小時內為患者媒合專科醫師，並以自有的純素非處方與處方產品線提供量身打造的治療方案。

summary.en: Democratizing access to precision weight-loss medications and care.
summary.zh: 讓精準減重藥物與照護更普及可及。

highlight.en: Alfie's virtual medical program, based on Cleveland Clinic and Harvard research, precisely matches members to weight-loss regimens and medications, reporting 2x better results than standard prescriptions.
highlight.zh: Alfie 以克里夫蘭診所與哈佛研究為基礎的虛擬醫療計畫，為會員精準配對減重方案與藥物，回報效果為標準處方的 2 倍。

summary.en: One tool to supercharge knowledge workers' productivity and focus.
summary.zh: 一站式工具，強化知識工作者的生產力與專注力。

highlight.en: LifeAt combines video content with task management to help over 1M knowledge workers get into flow and get through their daily tasks twice as fast.
highlight.zh: LifeAt 結合影音內容與任務管理，協助超過 100 萬名知識工作者進入心流，並以兩倍速度完成每日任務。

summary.en: Building the world's largest online store for surf gear.
summary.zh: 打造全球最大的線上衝浪裝備商店。

highlight.en: Boardcave is a one-stop shop providing surfers with online surf knowledge and gear, reimagining how surfers progress and take part in ocean activities.
highlight.zh: Boardcave 是一站式商店，為衝浪者提供線上衝浪知識與裝備，重新想像衝浪者如何進步並參與海上活動。

summary.en: An employee benefit for reproductive and hormone health.
summary.zh: 聚焦生殖與荷爾蒙健康的員工福利。

highlight.en: Syrona Health's add-on benefit covers gaps in women's health — fertility, menopause, female-specific cancers — plus men's and trans/nonbinary health, tackling $30B in out-of-pocket costs.
highlight.zh: Syrona Health 的附加福利涵蓋女性健康的缺口，包括生育、更年期與女性特有癌症，並納入男性及跨性別/非二元健康，以對應 300 億美元的自付醫療支出。

summary.en: Deploy apps to your own AWS with reliability, flexibility, and performance.
summary.zh: 將應用部署到自有 AWS，兼具可靠性、彈性與效能。

highlight.en: Flightcontrol is a PaaS that deploys to your own AWS account, avoiding black boxes, lock-in, and AWS markups while keeping power and flexibility.
highlight.zh: Flightcontrol 是一個部署至你自有 AWS 帳戶的 PaaS，避免黑箱、廠商鎖定與 AWS 加價，同時保有強大功能與彈性。

summary.en: Accidental death insurance for people undergoing surgery.
summary.zh: 為接受手術者提供的意外死亡保險。

highlight.en: Samos sells accidental death insurance for individuals undergoing surgery — like travel insurance, but covering a hospital stay.
highlight.zh: Samos 為接受手術的個人銷售意外死亡保險，就像旅遊保險，但承保的是住院期間。

summary.en: An AI-powered promotion management platform for online stores.
summary.zh: 為線上商店打造的 AI 促銷管理平台。

highlight.en: Cherry uses AI to deliver and track dynamic, real-time targeted promotions for online stores, reporting conversion-rate increases of up to 51%.
highlight.zh: Cherry 運用 AI 為線上商店投放並追蹤即時、動態的精準促銷，回報轉換率提升最高達 51%。

summary.en: Multimodal AI employees that see, speak, think, and act for enterprises.
summary.zh: 為企業打造、能看、能說、能思考並執行任務的多模態 AI 員工。

highlight.en: Cozmo lets regulated enterprises deploy AI employees that own workflows end to end and update systems like Guidewire and Salesforce, with every decision logged for a complete audit trail.
highlight.zh: Cozmo 讓受監管的企業部署能端到端負責工作流程、並更新 Guidewire、Salesforce 等系統的 AI 員工，且每項決策皆記錄在案，形成完整稽核軌跡。

summary.en: A cloud-based bioinformatics and AI platform that runs on your own cloud.
summary.zh: 在你自有雲端上運行的雲端生物資訊與 AI 平台。

highlight.en: HypaHub is the first HIPAA-compliant bioinformatics SaaS that runs natively on users' own clouds, automating computing resources so enterprises avoid maintaining costly R&D cloud infrastructure.
highlight.zh: HypaHub 是首個原生運行於用戶自有雲端的 HIPAA 合規生物資訊 SaaS，自動化運算資源，讓企業免於維護昂貴的研發雲端基礎設施。

summary.en: Detecting cyber attacks on critical physical infrastructure.
summary.zh: 偵測針對關鍵實體基礎設施的網路攻擊。

highlight.en: Palitronica uses side-channel information from endpoints to provide retrofittable attack detection that defends critical physical infrastructure and its supply chain.
highlight.zh: Palitronica 利用端點的旁路訊號，提供可加裝於現有系統的攻擊偵測能力，保護關鍵實體基礎設施及其供應鏈。

summary.en: AI-powered infrastructure plus mental health services, starting with women.
summary.zh: 結合 AI 驅動基礎設施與心理健康服務，從女性族群著手。

highlight.en: LunaJoy blends AI agents for care navigation and triage with specialized clinical services across life stages like pregnancy, postpartum, and perimenopause, expanding its in-network footprint.
highlight.zh: LunaJoy 將用於照護導引與分流的 AI 代理人，與涵蓋懷孕、產後、更年期前期等人生階段的專科臨床服務結合，並擴展其網路內覆蓋範圍。

summary.en: Stopping cows from burping methane to cut global emissions.
summary.zh: 阻止牛隻打嗝排放甲烷，以削減全球排放。

highlight.en: Alga Biosciences works with the cattle industry to reduce the methane emissions from enteric fermentation, leveraging biology to make an immediate impact on global emissions.
highlight.zh: Alga Biosciences 與畜牛業合作，減少腸道發酵產生的甲烷排放，運用生物學對全球排放立即產生影響。

summary.en: Serverless, real-time analytics on Postgres.
summary.zh: 建構於 Postgres 之上的無伺服器即時分析。

highlight.en: Hydra separates compute from storage to give engineers serverless Postgres analytics with autoscale, write isolation, and automatic caching, available for local, cloud, and bare-metal use.
highlight.zh: Hydra 將運算與儲存分離，為工程師提供具自動擴展、寫入隔離與自動快取的無伺服器 Postgres 分析，並支援本地、雲端與裸機部署。

summary.en: A global finance automation platform for complex multi-entity businesses.
summary.zh: 為複雜多實體企業打造的全球財務自動化平台。

highlight.en: Snab automates and centralizes global banking access and management for complex business groups with multiple subsidiaries, digitizing their access to financial services.
highlight.zh: Snab 為擁有多家子公司的複雜企業集團，自動化並集中管理全球銀行的存取與營運，並數位化其取得金融服務的方式。

summary.en: A customer support tool purpose-built for companies that sell APIs.
summary.zh: 專為銷售 API 的公司打造的客戶支援工具。

highlight.en: Fogbender embeds a team-to-team messaging widget on a customer dashboard — think Intercom meets Slack shared channels — so B2B vendors can support whole customer teams instead of individuals.
highlight.zh: Fogbender 在客戶儀表板嵌入團隊對團隊的訊息元件，宛如 Intercom 結合 Slack 共享頻道，讓 B2B 供應商能支援整個客戶團隊而非個人。

summary.en: Cross-chain routing and trading APIs for one-click transactions with any asset.
summary.zh: 支援任何資產一鍵交易的跨鏈路由與交易 API。

highlight.en: Decent provides cross-chain routing and trading APIs enabling one-click transactions with any asset on any chain — 'any asset, every chain, in an instant.'
highlight.zh: Decent 提供跨鏈路由與交易 API，讓任何鏈上的任何資產都能一鍵交易，主打「任何資產、每條鏈、瞬間完成」。

summary.en: A multibank treasury management platform for finance teams.
summary.zh: 為財務團隊打造的多銀行資金管理平台。

highlight.en: Arpari lets multibank finance teams consolidate company finances and manage payments and financial operations from a single dashboard.
highlight.zh: Arpari 讓使用多家銀行的財務團隊從單一儀表板整合公司財務，並管理付款與財務作業。
